title: Senior Doctor - Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services:
Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services!
